authors: Wei Zhong Bin Chen Fan Liang Maggie Mengqing Zhang a Department of Political Science
USAb Journalism and Media Studies Centre
raw_title: Picturing Protest: Visual Framing in Authoritarian Media on Twitter
title_en: Picturing Protest: Visual Framing in Authoritarian Media on Twitter
title_zh: 描绘抗议：威权媒体在推特上的视觉框架分析
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究分析了威权媒体如何在推特上使用图片来报道抗议活动。研究人员通过研究这些媒体发布的图片，了解它们如何塑造公众对抗议的看法。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how authoritarian media use images on Twitter to cover protests. Researchers analyze the pictures these media post to understand how they shape public perception of protests.
research_direction_zh: 探索威权国家媒体在社交媒体平台上的视觉传播策略及其对公众舆论的影响。
research_direction_en: Exploring visual communication strategies of authoritarian state media on social media platforms and their impact on public opinion.
